summary: Footage from the Oval Office swearing-in of Secretary Mark Wayne Mullin: Trump introduces him as a 'great American patriot' and Mullin gives brief remarks pledging to protect everyone regardless of red or blue states. An event/ceremony recording of remarks; no music or stylized montage editing.
notable_text: Mullin: 'I don't care if you're red or you're blue... my job is to be Secretary of Homeland and to protect everybody the same.' / 'failure is not an option'
